module_summaries.summary:
Users can log in or access courses as guests.
Displays login form with username and password fields.

Users can view upcoming activities and manage their timeline.
Displays personalized greeting, timeline, and calendar.

Users can view and filter their enrolled courses.
Displays course cards with images and category names.

Users can navigate through course content and sections.
Displays course name, tabs, and content sections.

Teachers can add or edit course activities and resources.
Displays editing controls and activity options.

Teachers can configure course settings and properties.
Displays collapsible sections with course details.

Users can manage and filter course participants.
Displays enrolled users with filtering options.

Teachers can view and manage assignment details.
Displays assignment info, dates, and grading summary.

Teachers can view and grade student submissions.
Displays submission table with filtering and grading options.

Students can view assignment details and submit work.
Displays submission form and assignment instructions.

Teachers can create advanced grading methods.
Displays options for rubric and grading form templates.

Teachers can view and manage course grades.
Displays grade table with filtering and report options.

Students can view their grades and feedback.
Displays grade table with item details and percentages.

Students can view all course activities by type.
Displays activities grouped in collapsible sections.

Users can view and edit their profile information.
Displays user details, profile description, and settings.

test_cases.title: Successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter a valid username
Enter a valid password
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the Dashboard

test_cases.title: Access as a guest
steps: Click the Access as a guest button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the guest access page

test_cases.title: Cookies notice button functionality
steps: Click the Cookies notice button
test_cases.expected_result: Cookies notice is dismissed

test_cases.title: Verify current date is highlighted in calendar block
steps: Open the Calendar block
Observe the calendar display
test_cases.expected_result: Current date is highlighted

test_cases.title: Verify event names are displayed on dates with events
steps: Open the Calendar block
Identify a date with an existing event
Observe the event name display on the date
test_cases.expected_result: Event names are displayed on dates with events

test_cases.title: Create a new calendar entry for a future date
steps: Open the Calendar block
Click on the 'New event' button
Enter valid event details for a future date
Save the event
test_cases.expected_result: New event is saved and displayed on the selected future date

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new calendar event appears on the selected future date
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify event names are displayed on dates with events
post_verifications.execution_note: This test can be adapted to verify if the new event is displayed on a specific date by modifying it to check the selected future date instead of any date with an existing event.
post_verifications.reason: The test operates on the correct module and accesses the calendar to display event names. However, it does not specifically confirm the presence of a new event on a selected future date.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually navigate to the selected future date in the calendar and verify the new event is displayed.

coverage_gaps: The test operates on the correct module and accesses the calendar to display event names. However, it does not specifically confirm the presence of a new event on a selected future date.

test_cases.title: Create a new calendar entry for the current date
steps: Open the Calendar block
Click on the 'New event' button
Enter valid event details for the current date
Save the event
test_cases.expected_result: New event is saved and displayed on the current date

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new calendar event appears on the current date
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify event names are displayed on dates with events
post_verifications.execution_note: Use this test to open the Calendar block and verify that the new event is displayed on the current date.

test_cases.title: Toggle edit mode to add a block

test_cases.title: Verify block is added to the dashboard
test_cases.preconditions: Add a block modal is open and block type is selected
steps: Click on the Add button in the Add a block modal
test_cases.expected_result: New block is added to the dashboard

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the new block is added to the dashboard
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases access or display the presence of a new block on the dashboard.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check the dashboard for the presence of the new block after the action.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases access or display the presence of a new block on the dashboard.

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with all valid inputs
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a description in the rich text editor
Check the 'Display description on course page' checkbox
Enter activity instructions in the rich text editor
Upload a valid file in the additional files upload area
Set a valid 'Allow submissions from' date/time
Set a valid 'Due date' date/time
Set a valid 'Cut-off date' date/time
Set a valid 'Remind me to grade by' date/time
Check the 'Always show description' checkbox
Check the 'Online text' checkbox
Check the 'File submissions' checkbox
Select a valid option from 'Maximum number of uploaded files' dropdown
Select a valid option from 'Maximum submission size' dropdown
Enter valid accepted file types
Check the 'Send content change notification' checkbox
Click the 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and the user is returned to the course page
coverage_gaps: No verification scenarios identified

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with 'Save and display'
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Click the 'Save and display' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and the activity page is displayed
coverage_gaps: No verification scenarios identified

test_cases.title: Cancel creating a new assignment

test_cases.expected_result: Changes are discarded and no assignment is created

test_cases.title: Save course settings with all valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Course Settings page
steps: Enter a valid course full name
Enter a valid course short name
Select a valid course category
Select a course visibility option
Select a course start date
Enable course end date and select a date
Enter a valid course ID number
Enter a course summary
Upload a valid file
Select a format from the dropdown
Select an option for hidden sections
Select a course layout
Select a force language option
Enter a number of announcements
Select an option to show gradebook to students
Select an option to show activity reports
Select an option to show activity dates
Select a maximum upload size
Enable completion tracking
Select an option to show activity completion conditions
Select a group mode
Select a force group mode
Select a default grouping
Enter tags
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Course settings are saved successfully and displayed

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the course settings are saved and displayed correctly
post_verifications.matched_test_title: Course start date and end date are the same
post_verifications.execution_note: This test case verifies that course settings are saved successfully, but it does not explicitly confirm that all settings are displayed correctly.
post_verifications.reason: The test case operates on the correct module and confirms that settings are saved, but it focuses on a specific condition (same start and end date) rather than verifying all settings are displayed correctly.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check that all course settings are displayed correctly on the course settings page after saving.

coverage_gaps: The test case operates on the correct module and confirms that settings are saved, but it focuses on a specific condition (same start and end date) rather than verifying all settings are displayed correctly.

test_cases.title: Apply filter with a single condition

test_cases.title: Apply filter with multiple conditions

Select a corresponding value from the Select dropdown
Click the + Add condition link
Select another criterion from the Any dropdown
Select a corresponding value from the Select dropdown
Click the Apply filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching all filter criteria

test_cases.title: Enroll user with valid username and role
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the enrol users page
steps: Select a valid username from the Enrolled users dropdown
Select a valid role from the role dropdown
Click on the Enrol users button
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the selected role

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the user is enrolled with the selected role
post_verifications.reason: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself, but none verify the outcome by checking the participants list for the new user with the correct role.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually check the participants list to confirm the new user is listed with the selected role.

coverage_gaps: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself, but none verify the outcome by checking the participants list for the new user with the correct role.

test_cases.title: Enroll user with valid email and role
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the enrol users page
steps: Select a valid email from the Enrolled users dropdown
Select a valid role from the role dropdown
Click on the Enrol users button
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the selected role

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the user is enrolled with the selected role
post_verifications.reason: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself and do not include steps to verify the participants list for the new user with the correct role after enrollment.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: After enrolling a user, manually check the participants list to confirm the user is listed with the correct role.

coverage_gaps: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself and do not include steps to verify the participants list for the new user with the correct role after enrollment.

test_cases.title: Clear filters after applying
steps: Click the Clear filters button
test_cases.expected_result: All filters are removed and the full list of participants is displayed

test_cases.title: Use alphabetical filter buttons

test_cases.expected_result: List of participants is filtered to show only those whose names start with the selected letter

test_cases.title: Enroll user with enrollment duration set
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the enrol users page
steps: Select a valid username from the Enrolled users dropdown
Select a valid role from the role dropdown
Set a valid enrollment duration
Click on the Enrol users button
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the selected role and duration

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the user is enrolled with the selected role and duration
post_verifications.reason: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself and do not include steps to verify the presence of the user in the participants list with the correct role and duration after enrollment.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: After enrolling a user, manually check the participants list to confirm the user is listed with the correct role and duration.

coverage_gaps: All candidate test cases focus on the enrollment process itself and do not include steps to verify the presence of the user in the participants list with the correct role and duration after enrollment.

post_verifications.matched_test_title: Verify activity name is displayed in Assignments section

Modify the content in the 'Online text' field or replace uploaded files

test_cases.expected_result: Submission is updated with the new content

post_verifications.ideal: Verify the Resources section is displayed on the Activities page
post_verifications.reason: All candidate tests focus on different sections (Assignments, Forums) or general page elements (page heading) and do not confirm the presence of the Resources section.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually navigate to the Activities page in the Student View and check for the presence of the Resources section.

coverage_gaps: All candidate tests focus on different sections (Assignments, Forums) or general page elements (page heading) and do not confirm the presence of the Resources section.

test_cases.title: Remove submission before due date

steps: Click on 'Edit submission' button
Remove all content from 'Online text' and 'Upload files'
Click on 'Save changes' button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission status updates to 'Draft (not submitted)'

post_verifications.ideal: Verify each activity in the Assignments section has a name displayed
post_verifications.reason: None of the test cases check for the presence of activity names in the Assignments section. They focus on due dates, submission status, or the presence of the section itself.
post_verifications.suggested_manual_step: Manually verify that each activity in the Assignments section has a name displayed by checking the Activities page in the Student View.

coverage_gaps: None of the test cases check for the presence of activity names in the Assignments section. They focus on due dates, submission status, or the presence of the section itself.
